countries.name: Portugal
countries.summary_fr: Climat doux, coût de la vie modéré, accueil chaleureux des expatriés.
countries.summary_en: Mild climate, moderate cost of living, welcoming to newcomers.

countries.name: Spain
countries.summary_fr: Climat chaud, forte culture, grande communauté francophone.
countries.summary_en: Warm climate, rich culture, large international community.

countries.name: Uruguay
countries.summary_fr: Stabilité politique remarquable en Amérique du Sud, espagnol requis.
countries.summary_en: Notably stable democracy in South America; Spanish required.

countries.name: Canada
countries.summary_fr: Anglophone et francophone (Québec), très stable, hivers froids.
countries.summary_en: English and French (Quebec), very stable, cold winters.

countries.name: Costa Rica
countries.summary_fr: Démocratie stable sans armée, nature exceptionnelle.
countries.summary_en: Stable democracy with no army, exceptional nature.

countries.name: Greece
countries.summary_fr: Coût de la vie bas, climat méditerranéen, îles.
countries.summary_en: Low cost of living, Mediterranean climate, islands.

countries.name: Ireland
countries.summary_fr: Anglophone, dans l'UE, économie dynamique, pluvieux.
countries.summary_en: English-speaking, in the EU, dynamic economy, rainy.

countries.name: New Zealand
countries.summary_fr: Très sûr et stable, nature spectaculaire, éloigné.
countries.summary_en: Very safe and stable, spectacular nature, remote.

countries.name: Mexico
countries.summary_fr: Coût de la vie très bas, grande communauté d'expatriés.
countries.summary_en: Very low cost of living, large expat community.

countries.name: Italy
countries.summary_fr: Culture, gastronomie, climat varié, bureaucratie lourde.
countries.summary_en: Culture, food, varied climate, heavy bureaucracy.

countries.name: Japan
countries.summary_fr: Extrêmement sûr, langue difficile, culture unique.
countries.summary_en: Extremely safe, difficult language, unique culture.

countries.name: Thailand
countries.summary_fr: Coût de la vie très bas, climat tropical, visas variables.
countries.summary_en: Very low cost of living, tropical climate, variable visas.
